name: Warhammer - Plainview
formatted_address: 14 Manetto Hill Rd, Plainview, NY 11803, US

external_payload.audit_note: Official Games Workshop / Warhammer store in Manetto Hill Plaza, Nassau County (Long Island). Address (14 Manetto Hill Rd, Plainview, NY 11803) and phone ((516) 932-0040) confirmed across YellowPages, Nextdoor, Instagram and the store's own 'Warhammer - Plainview' Facebook page. The Manhattan Games Workshop at 55 E 8th St is intentionally excluded as it is within NYC. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

name: Brothers Grim Games & Collectibles
formatted_address: 1244 Middle Country Rd, Selden, NY 11784, US

external_payload.audit_note: Long Island (Suffolk County) gaming hub. Address (1244 Middle Country Rd, Selden, NY 11784) and phone ((631) 698-2805) confirmed via the store's own site, Yelp, LongIsland.com and Wheree. Board game cafe in Huntington, Long Island. Address (307 Main St, Huntington, NY 11743) confirmed via Yelp (updated 2026). Phone omitted as not consistently published across the reviewed sources. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

name: New Kawaii
formatted_address: 1 Bridge St Ste 105-A, Irvington, NY 10533, US

external_payload.audit_note: Westchester County games/toys store near the Irvington Metro-North station. Address (1 Bridge St, Ste 105-A, Irvington, NY 10533) and phone ((914) 279-0001) confirmed via the Wizards of the Coast store locator, Chamber of Commerce and the store's own site. Runs miniature wargaming (Warhammer and skirmish games) plus board games and TTRPGs. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

Hudson Valley FLGS. The current active location is 2600 South Rd (Route 9), Poughkeepsie, NY 12603, phone (845) 471-1401, confirmed via Wargames.com directory, the store's own contact page and BBB; note an older 794 Main St location shows as closed on Yelp. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

Capital District comics-and-games store. Address (1238 Central Ave, Albany, NY 12205) and phone ((518) 438-7202) confirmed via Apple Maps, Yelp, Groupon, YellowPages and the comic shop locator. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

Capital District board game cafe in downtown Troy with 1,000+ titles. Address (501 Broadway, Ste 105, Troy, NY 12180) and phone ((518) 948-6693) confirmed via the cafe's own site, Yelp, Chamber of Commerce and Apple Maps. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

name: Play the Game Read the Story
formatted_address: 689 N Clinton St, Syracuse, NY 13204, US

external_payload.audit_note: Syracuse comics/games store (est. 1998), main location on N Clinton St (a second location is inside Destiny USA mall). Address (689 N Clinton St, Syracuse, NY 13204) and phone ((315) 472-4263) confirmed via the store's own site, Yelp and BoardGamesStores. Explicitly stocks Games Workshop / Warhammer, Magic, board games, RPGs and miniatures. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

One of the largest game stores in the US (~28,000 sq ft). Address (1225 Jefferson Rd, Rochester, NY 14623) and phone ((585) 427-2190) confirmed via the store's own site, Wargames.com directory, Yelp and LGS Finder. Hosts dozens of weekly events including Magic, Warhammer 40,000, D&D and more. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.

Buffalo West Side game store and game library. Address (463 Amherst St, Buffalo, NY 14207) and phone ((716) 342-2823) confirmed via the store's own site, Yelp, iLoveNY and Instagram. Carries Warhammer, D&D, Magic and Pokemon. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.
